_source: Jira MCP: PXF - Invoices + PXF - Invoice Processing components, status != Done
_query: project = DEV AND component in ("PXF - Invoices", "PXF - Invoice Processing") AND issuetype = Epic AND statusCategory != Done
_notes: Pulled 76 active epics across two components.
Release cadence parsed from epic summary (e.g., 'R3 2026', 'R2 2027'). Epics without a release tag land in 'Unspecified'.
Sort order within each release: priority ascending (P0 first), then status (In Dev/Refinement first).
ELI Invoice Entry is treated as a sub-theme of IPS (its epics carry the PXF - Invoice Processing component).
